{"problem_standardized_math":"Verify that, if the inequality constraint \(3x_1+2x_3\ge 1\) is added to problem \((15.11)\), then eliminating \(x_3\) and \(x_6\) by\n\\[\n\\begin{bmatrix}\nx_3\\\\\nx_6\n\\end{bmatrix}\n=-\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n8 & -6 & 9 & 4\\\\\n\\frac{3}{4} & \\frac{1}{2} & -\\frac{1}{4} & \\frac{3}{2}\n\\end{bmatrix}\n\\begin{bmatrix}\nx_1\\\\\nx_2\\\\\nx_4\\\\\nx_5\n\\end{bmatrix}\n+\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n6\\\\\n-1\n\\end{bmatrix}\n\\tag{15.12}\n\\]\ntransforms the problem into\n\\[\n\\min_{x_1,x_2,x_4,x_5}\; \\,\sin(x_1+x_2)+(8x_1-6x_2+9x_4+4x_5-6)^2\n\\tag{15.13}\n\\]\nsubject to the corresponding inequality constraint obtained after the elimination."}
